title: rockhausenia microphylla
intro: Rockhausenia microphylla, also known as Rock Hausenia or Microphylla, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in China, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rockhausenia microphylla include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of the common cold, and support the immune system. Rockhausenia microphylla is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas for its medicinal properties.
